root.sql: select sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code , sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_refno) as count_dep , count(sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem , count(distinct sc_cls_confirm_data.membership_no) as count_mem_all , sum(sc_cls_confirm_data.data_balance) as sum_dep_bal from sc_cls_confirm_data , sc_dep_m_rule where sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_group = 'DEP' and sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type in ('90','91') /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date = '30/04/2024' group by sc_cls_confirm_data.confirm_date , sc_cls_confirm_data.data_type , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name , sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code
